pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pay with USDC on Base network. No subscriptions, monthly quotas reset automatically.

q1.question: What is USDC?
q1.answer: USDC is a stablecoin pegged to the US dollar. 1 USDC = $1 USD. We accept USDC on the Base network for fast and low-cost payments.

q2.question: What is Base network?
q2.answer: Base is an Ethereum Layer 2 network built by Coinbase. It offers fast transactions and low fees while maintaining Ethereum's security.

q3.question: Do credits expire?
q3.answer: No, your credits never expire. Use them whenever you're ready to generate new content.

q4.question: Can I get a refund?
q4.answer: Since payments are processed on-chain, we cannot offer refunds. However, we're confident you'll love the results!

payment.title: Unlock Full Content
payment.subtitle: Pay with USDC on Base network to unlock your generated content
payment.notice: Payment is processed on Base network. Make sure you have USDC in your wallet.
